scenes.text: I drove through the old neighborhood last week.
scenes.image_prompt: View through a car windshield of a modest residential street in a Caribbean neighborhood, warm afternoon light, palm trees, colorful houses, cinematic POV shot, nostalgic, 4k

scenes.text: The corner store is a laundromat now. The park has new benches nobody sits on.
scenes.image_prompt: A small neighborhood park with brand new empty benches, no people, a converted corner store visible in the background, overcast nostalgic light, cinematic wide shot, melancholic, 4k

scenes.text: Someone painted over the wall where we drew our names in chalk every summer.
scenes.image_prompt: A freshly painted concrete wall, clean and blank, faint traces of old chalk drawings barely visible underneath, warm afternoon shadows, emotional cinematic close-up, 4k

scenes.text: The house looks smaller than I remember. The mango tree in the backyard is gone.
scenes.image_prompt: A small modest house seen from the street, slightly faded paint, an empty patch of dirt in the yard where a tree used to be, warm golden hour light, cinematic nostalgic mood, 4k

scenes.text: But for a second, sitting in that car, I was ten years old again. And nothing had changed yet.
scenes.image_prompt: Interior of a parked car, hands on the steering wheel, blurred neighborhood visible through the window, warm sunset reflections on the dashboard, emotional cinematic portrait from behind, 4k
